{{Infobox character
| name = Terkell
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Terkell]] is [[Kerani]]'s supervisor and a woman with gray hair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Terkell]] uses two small spirit-tanks strapped to her forearms.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Terkell]] possesses one bound spirit of [[life]] and one of dreams.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
